content: I'm so glad I finally finished reading 'The Nightingale' by Kristin Hannah. It was such a powerful story.
That's a great book! What did you think of the characters and their development throughout the story?
I loved how the author portrayed the sisters' relationship. It reminded me of my own relationship with my sister, who lives in San Francisco. I miss her since I moved to Pittsburgh.
It can be tough to be away from family. Do you find that you have more time to focus on your hobbies now that you're working remotely?
Definitely. I've been able to practice my DJing skills more often and even started a small speedcubing group in Pittsburgh. We meet up every Thursday at 6 PM.
That sounds like a great way to meet new people who share similar interests. Have you found any good spots to fly your drone and take photos in Pittsburgh?
Actually, I have. There's a great spot near the Andy Warhol Bridge that offers a stunning view of the city. I took my drone out there last weekend and got some amazing shots.
I'll have to look that up. It sounds like a great spot for photography. Do you have any favorite books or authors that you always come back to?
I'm a big fan of historical fiction, especially books set during World War II. I've read all of Kristin Hannah's books and I'm looking for something new to read. Do you have any recommendations?
Have you tried 'All the Light We Cannot See' by Anthony Doerr? It's a Pulitzer Prize-winning novel set during World War II and it's a beautifully written story.
That sounds amazing. I'll have to add it to my list. I'm planning a trip to New York City in June to visit some friends and I want to make sure I have a good book to read on the plane.
You'll love it. Let me know what you think of it once you've finished reading it. And have a great trip to New York City!
Thanks, I'm really looking forward to it. I've been practicing my tennis serve and I'm hoping to play a few matches while I'm in the city.
That sounds like a great way to stay active while you're traveling. Maybe you can even find a tennis court with a great view of the city.
That would be amazing. I'll have to look into it. Thanks for the conversation, it's been great chatting with you!
You're welcome, Morgan. It was great chatting with you too. I hope you have a great day and happy reading!
You too! I'm going to go work on my origami skills now. I'm trying to make a paper crane.
That sounds like a fun project. I hope it turns out well. Let me know if you need any tips or recommendations for origami tutorials.
Will do, thanks! I'm thinking of making a few paper cranes to decorate my apartment. It'll be a nice touch.
That's a great idea. I'm sure it'll look beautiful. Have fun with your project and don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything else.
Thanks, I will. I'm going to go practice my drone photography skills now. Maybe I'll get some good shots to post on social media.
Sounds like a plan. Have fun and be careful with your drone. I'll talk to you later, Morgan.
